settings.title: Settings
settings.menu.change_cwd.hint: pick a folder → cd current pane
settings.menu.open_folder.hint: pick a folder → spawn new tab there
settings.menu.web_settings.hint: themes, proxy, sessions, all the rest
theme.title: Theme
theme.preset.standard.name: Standard
theme.preset.midnight.name: Midnight
theme.preset.daylight.name: Daylight
theme.preset.daylight.desc: Readable light mode for bright rooms
theme.preset.classic.name: Classic
proxy.title: Proxy Settings
proxy.footer.hint: Enter Switch   T Toggle   D Disable   Esc Close
shell.title: New Tab
shell.subtitle: Choose a shell profile
shell.footer.hint: ↑↓ Navigate   Enter Open   Esc Cancel   1-9 Quick
confirm.kill_tab: 🛑 Really kill this tab and all contained panes?
confirm.kill_window: 🛑 Really kill this window and all contained tabs and panes?
recording.started: Recording started — output → {path}. Toggle off in Settings (▼).
recording.stopped: Recording stopped — {blocks} blocks captured. Markdown at {path}
recording.fallback_notice: osc133 not active — install shell integration for block-level breakdown
screenshot.started: {mode} screenshot started. Drag a region or press Esc to cancel.
cwd.prompt: Select a folder to cd into the current pane.
project.prompt_new_tab: Select a folder to spawn a new tab.
project.prompt_picker: Select a project directory to open in a new tab.
theme.saved_palette_failed: Theme saved as {name}, palette apply failed: {err}
admin.requested: Admin PowerShell requested. Accept the UAC prompt.
web.compat.title: Compatibility
web.compat.subtitle: Some third-party tools (Gemini CLI, certain IDE detectors) only whitelist a fixed set of terminal names. Spoof TERM_PROGRAM here without losing Unterm's identity for everything else.
web.compat.term_program_hint: Default "Unterm". Click a preset below or type a custom value.
web.compat.new_shell_hint: Saved. Open a new tab — running shells keep their old TERM_PROGRAM.
web.scrollback.title: Scrollback
web.scrollback.subtitle: How many output lines each pane keeps in its history buffer. New lines are appended; once the buffer fills, the oldest line is dropped.
web.scrollback.lines_hint: Bigger means more history at the cost of RAM (~96 bytes per cell × cols × lines).
web.scrollback.restart_hint: Saved. New panes use this immediately; restart Unterm to apply to existing panes.
web.general.title: General
web.general.subtitle: Server-side identity and ports for this Unterm instance.
web.general.selftest.title: Self-test
web.appearance.title: Appearance
web.appearance.subtitle: Switch the running terminal's color scheme. Applies instantly.
web.proxy.title: Proxy
web.proxy.subtitle: Route Unterm's outbound HTTP / SOCKS traffic through a local proxy. Auto-detect mirrors the system proxy settings.
web.proxy.auto.label: Auto-detect from system
web.proxy.auto.hint: Use the OS proxy configuration as a starting point.
web.recording.title: Recording
web.recording.subtitle_pre: Captured terminal sessions are stored under
web.recording.subtitle_post: and rendered to redacted markdown on demand.
web.recording.active.title: Active recording
web.recording.active.hint: Toggle from the in-terminal Settings menu (▼) — the active pane is what gets recorded.
web.recording.past.heading: Past sessions ({n})
web.recording.session.label: Session {id}
web.project.title: Project
web.project.subtitle: The current pane's working directory determines the project slug attached to recorded sessions.
web.project.help: To open a different project, use the in-terminal Settings menu (▼) → "Project Directory…".
web.about.title: About
web.about.line: Cross-platform terminal with built-in MCP and HTTP control planes.
web.language.title: Language
web.language.subtitle: Choose the interface language. Changing this reloads the page.
web.toast.bootstrap_failed: Could not load bootstrap.json — backend offline?
cli.proxy.head.name: NAME
cli.theme.head.name: NAME
cli.theme.unknown: unknown theme preset '{name}'. Run `unterm-cli theme list` to see options.
cli.session.head.title: TITLE
cli.session.no_panes: no live panes found; pass --id or open a pane in Unterm
cli.lang.head.name: NAME
cli.lang.unknown: unknown locale '{code}'. Run `unterm-cli lang list` to see options.
cli.settings.no_port: Unterm GUI is running but the HTTP-Settings server hasn't published its port yet
settings.menu.open_folder_split.hint: pick a folder → split right with that cwd
project.prompt_split: Select a folder to open as a split.
